steps.label: prepare
steps.rationale: Retrieve memory or search context before reading papers.

steps.label: collect_evidence
steps.rationale: Collect evidence from the local corpus.

steps.label: synthesize
steps.rationale: Draft the review from available evidence.

steps.label: final_verify
steps.rationale: Check final success criteria before stopping.

steps.label: stop_or_handoff
steps.rationale: Stop successfully or emit a bounded handoff outcome.
